title: Realistic Icons
description: Makes the empty armor slots in your inventory consistant with the player!
body:
# Realistic Icons

Realistic icons is a minimal recource pack built to redesign the empty armor slot icons! The icons have long been outdated. Originally added in infdev, 15 years ago, they havent been updated a single time since! But with Realistic icons, they actually are consistant with the blocky player that you all love.

# Images

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0694df87d25efecca583fd4bd8c8009103e1c75.png)
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab0cb7030c7839acd1a4e6670de9744cb85d5a08.png)
![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7957990b8e37857da3eec6befb5a31991583d90b.png)

# Changelog

v1.0 - The inital release. Contains basic icons and a good starting point for future additions, supporting versions 1.19.3 - 1.21.4

v2.0 - Eyes on head slot, Arms on chestplate lowered

v2.1 - Added better offhand sheild thingy

# Credits

100% created by me. Used photoshop and pixelorama. Gallery images are ingame screenshots.
